---
execute: 
  echo: false
---

Information for Newton GenX Schoolboys Football Club

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)

# Calculate next 5 Saturdays (or starting today if Saturday)
first_saturday <- today() |>
  (\(d) if (wday(d, week_start = 1) == 6) d else d + days(6 - wday(d, week_start = 1)))()

saturdays <- first_saturday + weeks(0:3)

# Format a date to match the page format, e.g. "Saturday March 21, 2026"
format_date <- \(d) {
  d |>
    format("%A %B %d, %Y") |>
    str_replace(" 0", " ")
}

# Function to fetch reservations table from a field URL
fetch_table <- \(url) {
  read_html(url) |>
    html_table() |>
    keep(\(tbl) "Date" %in% names(tbl)) |>
    first()
}

# Define the two fields
fields <- tribble(
  ~name,            ~url,
  "Brandeis Field", "https://newtonma.myrec.com/info/facilities/area_info.aspx?FacilityID=15013&AreaID=15160",
  "Stadium Field",  "https://newtonma.myrec.com/info/facilities/area_info.aspx?FacilityID=15013&AreaID=15034"
)

# Fetch all tables once (avoid hitting the server repeatedly)
tables <- fields |>
  mutate(data = map(url, fetch_table))

# Print reservations for each Saturday
saturdays |>
  walk(\(sat) {
    target_date <- format_date(sat)
    cat(target_date, "\n\n")

    tables |>
      pwalk(\(name, url, data) {
        reservations <- data |>
          filter(Date == target_date)
        cat(name, ":\n", sep = "")
        if (is.null(reservations) || nrow(reservations) == 0) {
          cat("  No reservations found.\n\n")
        } else {
          reservations |>
            select(Event, Time) |>
            pwalk(\(Event, Time) cat("  ", Event, " | ", Time, "\n"))
          cat("\n")
        }
      })

    cat("\n")
  })
```
